GOBD Coordination

GOBD & GOOY

  • GOBD Controllers, particularly Tower and Approach, should be mindful of simultaneous operations at GOBD and GOOY. In most cases, both airports will operate similar runway configurations (North/South). The fact that both airports are 30 nm apart allows for some maneuvering room, but during events, release management should be coordinated through Diass Approach.

GOBD & GVSC

  • For flights departing GOBD to airports at Cape Verde, GOBD Approach should coordinate with GVSC CTR or GVSC APP. In the absence of GOOO CTR and/or GVSC CTR, GOBD APP is authorized to handover traffic to GVSC APP.

GOBD & GOOO

  • Flights departing GOBD for GQNO can be handed over from GOBD Approach to GQNO Approach.

GOBD & Oceanic

  • All GOBD departing flights that will cross Oceanic Airspace (GVSC or GOOO) will need request Oceanic Clearance on ground (to be confirmed).

GOBD Blaise Diagne Intl | v0.1
